result.vlm_summary:
<TRAJECTA_DATA_fac77f08>page_state:
Booking.com search results for Phuket, list view, scrolled to a visible resort result.
task_relevant_visible_text:
“Phuket: 15 properties found”; “Resorts”; “The Westin Siray Bay Resort & Spa, Phuket”; “Very Good 8.2”; “Beachfront”; “Free cancellation”; “No prepayment needed”; “Per night $106”; “$701”; “6 nights, 2 adults”; dates shown: “Tue, May 5 — Mon, May 11”.
selected_candidate:
The Westin Siray Bay Resort & Spa, Phuket
constraint_evidence:
- Phuket destination: supported (search field and results header show Phuket)
- beach resort: supported (filter chip “Resorts”; property shows “Beachfront” and resort name)
- guest rating above 8.5: contradicted (visible rating is 8.2, “Very Good”)
- 6-night stay: supported (visible “6 nights, 2 adults”)
- stay from May 5, 2026: supported (visible dates “Tue, May 5 — Mon, May 11”)
- availability: supported for this listing via “See availability” button; overall results note many unavailable, but this property is actionable
- Phuket Town specifically: not_visible (URL says Phuket Town, screenshot shows Phuket/Phuket Province results)
- price constraint: not_visible (no max price specified in task)
action_target:
Scroll down to inspect more resort listings that may have rating > 8.5.
success_signals:
A visible resort listing with rating > 8.5 and matching dates/6-night stay.
failure_signals:
Current visible candidate fails rating threshold (8.2); no confirmed qualifying resort yet.
uncertainty:
Only one listing is fully visi</TRAJECTA_DATA_fac77f08>

task_context.task: navigate: Search for a beach resort in Phuket with a guest rating above 8.5, available for a 6-night stay from May 5, 2026.
task_context.title: <TRAJECTA_DATA_fac77f08>Booking.com: Hotels in Phuket. Book your hotel now!</TRAJECTA_DATA_fac77f08>

observation.title: <TRAJECTA_DATA_fac77f08>Booking.com: Hotels in Phuket. Book your hotel now!</TRAJECTA_DATA_fac77f08>

evidence.claim: The task was to find a beach resort in Phuket with guest rating above 8.5 for a 6-night stay starting May 5, 2026. The agent reached Booking.com search results for those dates and destination.

By step 12, the agent had applied a Resorts filter (URL nflt=ht_id=206). The visible candidate was 'The Westin Siray Bay Resort & Spa, Phuket' with rating 8.2, which contradicts the required rating above 8.5, so the task was not yet satisfied at that point.

By step 14, the agent had narrowed results further (URL adds review_score=90) and the screenshot shows one visible result, 'YUSU Hotel 羽宿酒店', rated 9.6 for the correct 6-night May 5–11 stay. However, the visible card is a hotel, not a clearly qualifying beach resort: the card shows 'Beach Nearby' and distance from beach, while the resorts filter chip is visible, leaving the exact resort qualification only partial on-screen.

At the final step, the page explicitly says 'Phuket: no properties found' and shows 'Properties around Phuket' instead. The visible candidate is 'Amatara Welleisure Resort' with rating 9.0 and 'Beachfront', but the screenshot indicates it is around Phuket / 5.8 miles from Phuket rather than a result in Phuket itself.

The agent then exited without selecting or reporting a candidate that was visibly confirmed to satisfy all constraints together. The final visible state contradicts the location requirement by showing no properties found in Phuket and only around-Phuket suggestions.

args.expected_behavior: The agent should finish on a result that is visibly a qualifying beach resort in Phuket with guest rating above 8.5 and availability for May 5–11, 2026, or continue searching instead of exiting if the current page only shows around-Phuket suggestions.
args.actual_behavior: The agent exited on a results page stating 'Phuket: no properties found' and showing an around-Phuket resort suggestion, without confirming a final candidate that visibly satisfied the full task.
args.regression_rule: Fail when the agent exits from a travel search on a page that explicitly says no results for the requested destination and only shows nearby/around-destination alternatives, without selecting or reporting a candidate visibly satisfying all required constraints in the requested destination.
